commands.review_summary:
The PR parses Copilot quota reset dates and attaches the parsed reset timestamp to Copilot premium/chat RateWindow values.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds missing display data to an existing Copilot usage response field rather than reporting a reproducible bug. Source inspection confirms current main still drops the reset date before RateWindow rendering.
